message:
fix: exempt critical paths from apiLimiter and publicLimiter (#10330)

Dashboard card polling exhausts the general apiLimiter (2000 req/min)
and publicLimiter (120 req/min), which then blocks user-facing flows:
feedback submission, the Updates dialog PR changelog, OAuth login,
and version checks.

Root causes:
1. apiLimiter group middleware applied to ALL /api/* routes including
   standalone routes registered outside the group (Fiber v2 behavior)
2. authLimiter (10 req/min) on /api/me caused login loops when budget
   was exhausted by initial page load
3. 16 separate Group("/api", publicLimiter) registrations for
   compliance/supply-chain handlers each independently applied
   publicLimiter to every /api/* route

Fixes:
- apiLimiterWithSkip: skip /api/me, /api/version, /api/feedback/requests,
  and all /api/github/* paths
- Remove authLimiter from /api/me GET/PUT (JWTAuth is sufficient)
- Consolidate 16 publicLimiter groups into one shared group with
  publicLimiterWithSkip that exempts the same critical paths plus
  /api/auth/*

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
